title: Arabia Will Be Green Again
_note: Vertical 9:16 short (>=60s content). Authentic: hadith in Sahih Muslim 157 (Abu Hurayrah) that the land of the Arabs will become meadows and rivers again; framed within the larger 'wealth abundant' narration, not detached. Science kept separate: 2025 Nature paper 'Recurrent humid phases in Arabia over the past 8 million years' (speleothem record; Max Planck; rivers/lakes/grasslands/hippos), plus present-day greening. Qur'an 36:33 (dead earth revived) shown on screen, never recited. No claim of fulfilment, no date-setting. All footage frame-grab QC'd: human-free, text-free. Render the vertical StoryVideo composition (orientation=vertical).

segments.text: This is one of the driest places on the entire planet. And the Prophet, peace be upon him, told us it will not always look like this.
He said the Hour will not come until the land of the Arabs becomes meadows and rivers, once again.
Once again. As if all of this endless sand had been green before, long before any human being could have known it.
And a sign for them is the dead earth. We give it life, and bring forth from it grain, from which they eat.
And here is what we have only just been able to confirm. In 2025, a study in the journal Nature read the climate history hidden inside Arabian caves.
It found that for the last eight million years, Arabia has turned green again and again.
Rivers. Lakes. Open grasslands. Hippos once waded through water where there is now nothing but dunes.
At least six separate humid periods turned this desert into savannah, every time the rains came back.
And in our own time, the rains are returning. In places, the Arabian desert is quietly flowering green again.
We are not saying the Hour has arrived. No soul knows that day. We only know that the One who described this land, fourteen centuries early, was not guessing.
He was telling the truth. So watch the land, and reflect.

sources: Sahih Muslim 157 (Abu Hurayrah): the Hour will not come until wealth is so abundant no one accepts charity, and until the land of the Arabs returns to meadows and rivers. Verified on sunnah.com (muslim:157c). Quoted within its context, not detached.

Qur'an 36:33 (Ya-Sin), shown on screen with translation, never recited or synthesized: 'And a sign for them is the dead earth. We give it life and bring forth from it grain, and from it they eat.' Arabic pulled from Quran.com.

Science (kept separate from scripture): 'Recurrent humid phases in Arabia over the past 8 million years', Nature, 2025 (speleothem/cave-mineral record; Max Planck Institute of Geoanthropology). Paleoclimate evidence of rivers, lakes, grasslands and large fauna (incl. hippos) during repeated humid phases; reported by National Geographic and Phys.org. Present-day greening/unusual rainfall noted as current fact, not as fulfilment.
Framing: presented as reflection, NOT a claim that the prophecy is fulfilled; no date-setting. No human faces; all imagery human-free, frame-grab QC'd.
